rows.title: Handle Tom Lee and Fundstrat video updates through transcripts or captions
rows.why: Some Tom Lee macro updates are video-first. They may matter, but video extraction is lower priority than text FlashInsights, email full-body intake, and dashboard action reliability.
rows.done_when: Authenticated Fundstrat video pages can produce compact transcript-derived rows only when a visible transcript, captions, companion article text, or user-supplied compact notes exist; video-only titles and thumbnails remain discovery/audit-only.
